summary: Iteration 2 backend + frontend E2E testing complete. All 47 backend tests pass (26 from iter1 regression + 21 new iter2). 4 new backend dashboards fully validated: food-menu, consistency, grid-planner, calendar. Stats now includes food_menu count. Frontend E2E confirmed: register → 3-step onboarding → dashboard works; Grid Planner save+persist+reload works; Consistency Checker renders with Brand DNA reference; Content Calendar add-event works (event visible on calendar grid); mobile bottom-nav present with 5 items. Sidebar nav shows all 9 expected sections.

minor.issue: Uses full CalendarEventIn (all fields required). Should accept partial payloads (true PATCH semantics).
Returns literal null when no layout exists (same anti-pattern flagged in iter1 for /brand-profile). Consider 200 {} or 404 for cleaner FE handling.
Only enforces len(slots) <= 9 but does not enforce slot_index uniqueness within 0-8 nor minimum slot count. Could create layout with duplicate indices.
scheduled_date accepted as raw string without date format validation. '2026-13-99' would pass. Recommend Pydantic date type.

action_items: (Optional) Make PATCH /api/calendar/{id} accept partial payloads instead of full CalendarEventIn.
(Optional) Validate scheduled_date format on /api/calendar (use Pydantic date type).
(Optional) Standardize empty-resource responses (grid-planner & brand-profile currently return raw null).

Verify mobile More page navigation: I could not click testid `mobile-nav-more` from dashboard view. The mobile bottom-nav itself renders (5 icons visible: Home/Banner/Carousel/Copy/More). Main agent should confirm `nav-more` link wires correctly and /more renders MorePage with `more-page` + `more-link-*` testids.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1133 lines — well past 700-line guidance. Strongly recommend splitting into modules: auth.py, brand.py, prompts/banner.py, prompts/carousel.py, prompts/food_menu.py, llm.py (photo + consistency + copywriting), planning.py (grid + calendar).

Three LLM endpoints (photo/analyze, copywriting, consistency/check) duplicate the same try/import + markdown-strip + JSON-extract logic ~30 lines each. Extract into a single `call_llm_json(prompt, image=None)` helper.
_build_banner_prompt, _build_carousel_prompts, _build_food_menu_prompt share color/brand-name defaulting boilerplate — extract `resolve_brand_palette(brand)` helper.

Mongo indexes still missing: db.users.email (unique), db.generated_prompts.{user_id, created_at}, db.calendar_events.{user_id, scheduled_date}, db.grid_layouts.user_id (unique), db.consistency_checks.{user_id, created_at}.
Pydantic Field constraints absent on FoodMenuIn.mood/layout (free-text); a typo silently falls back to defaults. Use Literal[...] types so 422 fires on invalid values.
GridSlotIn.slot_index has no bounds (should be Field(ge=0, le=8)).
Carousel slide_count bound still checked manually — noted in iter1 but unresolved.
/api/consistency/check return shape inconsistent: 200 on success, 400 on missing brand, but on LLM parse failure returns 200 with {error:...} body. Standardize to 422 or document client contract.
/api/photo/analyze on parse failure returns a fabricated successful-looking object — dangerous for UI which can't distinguish real vs fallback.
test_credentials: Tests generate fresh @feedifyqa.io users per run (TEST_ prefix). Documented demo@feedifyqa.io must be registered via /api/auth/register before login. All emails MUST use real-looking TLD (.io/.com/.id) — .test rejected by email-validator.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates: 1 primary user + brand profile, 1 isolation user (TestUserIsolation), 1 no-brand user (TestConsistencyChecker), 1 grid-test user, multiple prompts (banner/carousel/copy/food-menu), 2 calendar events (1 deleted during test). All TEST_ prefixed for easy cleanup. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest /app/backend/tests/ — expect 47/47 passes (Gemini Vision + text LLM live calls included). conftest.py builds a real coffee-cup JPEG with multiple objects/edges/colors for vision endpoints (satisfies /app/image_testing.md). Frontend E2E: token storage key in localStorage is non-standard — do NOT seed tokens manually; use the actual register UI flow to obtain auth state. Onboarding step 2 has NO data-testid prefix `color-preset-*` (uses generic color swatches); step 3 has no `style-*`/`tone-*` prefixes either but does work via real click — it auto-advances. Mobile More page UI was not deeply verified — click on `[data-testid=mobile-nav-more]` from dashboard didn't fire; main agent should confirm testid wiring.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Single transient test failure (consistency_check_with_brand) on first run because that test relied on brand profile created by iter1 ordering. Fixed by inlining brand-profile creation inside the test. Now order-independent.
